operations.title: Read Channel Context
operations.summary: Read bounded recent Slack channel messages for declared context without exposing raw workspace tools.

inputs.name: channel_id
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for channel_id when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: query
inputs.summary: Optional text filter for recent messages.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for query when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: limit
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for limit when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: backend_options
inputs.summary: Bounded Slack provider options such as formatting mode or unfurl posture. Must not bypass channel scope, approval, or send policy.
inputs.clarification_hint: Do not ask for backend_options unless the user explicitly needs provider-specific controls.

inputs.summary: Bounded Slack provider options such as formatting mode or unfurl posture. Must not bypass channel scope, approval, or send policy.
